race.comment: LISELLE'S LUCK (8) is overdue for a win, finding the minor money in all three runs back this prep. Has good early speed and only needs to hold her form to be saluting this time. SOUTHERN MONARCH (6) wasted no time getting off the mark on debut over 1100m at Clare three weeks ago. Will come on following that run and looks a definite threat. NADEGE (3) scored two back at Balaklava but was below her best last time. Finds a nice race and can make amends. FIABESCA (9) couldn't meet market expectation first-up at Balaklava but was far from disgraced. Didn't fire a shot last time but is open to sharp improvement third-up with the blinkers applied first time. Not dismissing.
